raw_consumer_statement: American Express advertises a " digital entertainment credit '' with their American Express XXXX card. One of the digital services included in the benefit is with the XXXX service. I signed up for the XXXX service. When the charge hits the credit card, it shows as " XXXX '' from XXXX. When I called American Express about the issue, the representative told me to " call XXXX. '' This is their issue, not mine. They should rectify their billing issues, not me.
